headline: Morning drive host, The Asha Show — Rhythm FM 94.7
summary: Morning drive host of The Asha Show at Rhythm FM 94.7 (Kgosi Media Group) in Johannesburg. Twelve years on South African radio, telling the stories of the city through Voices of the City. Founder of the JMU Youth Media Mentorship programme and host of the upcoming Off-Mic podcast (public pilot 2 October 2026; Episode 1 launching 19 January 2027). Currently writing a book on South African radio culture. Available for speaking on broadcasting, media mentorship, and the craft of live radio. Languages: English, Spanish, Portuguese, Afrikaans.
